queries.name: Dangerous Rights for Groups under Domain Users/Computers, Authenticated Users and Everyone

queryList.title: Select a Domain...
queryList.query: MATCH (n:Domain) RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name DESC

MATCH p=(m:Group {domain: $result})-[r1:MemberOf*0..]->(g:Group)-[:Owns|WriteDacl|GenericAll|WriteOwner|ExecuteDCOM|GenericWrite|AllowedToDelegate|ForceChangePassword|AllExtendedRights]->(n) WHERE (m.objectid ENDS WITH '-513' OR m.objectid ENDS WITH '-515' OR m.objectid ENDS WITH '-S-1-5-11' OR m.objectid ENDS WITH '-S-1-1-0') RETURN p
